jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Fortis Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Fortis Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Fortis Healthcare:
Fortis Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare!
